problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power may resolve How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
